check_content_excerpt:
Verify the policy value for Computer Configuration >> Administrative Templates >> Windows Components >> Microsoft Defender Antivirus >> "Turn off Windows Defender Antivirus" is set to “Not Configured”.

For Windows 10:
Procedure: Use the Windows Registry Editor to navigate to the following key: 
HKLM\Software\Policies\Microsoft\Windows Defender

Criteria: If the value "DisableAntiSpyware" does not exist, this is not a finding.
fix_text_excerpt: For Windows 10: Set the policy value for Computer Configuration >> Administrative Templates >> Windows Components >> Microsoft Defender Antivirus "Turn off Microsoft Defender Antivirus" to "Not Configured".
title: Microsoft Defender AV must be configured to run and scan for malware and other potentially unwanted software.
